controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (rural cooperative banks - transfer and distribution of credit risk) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Rural Cooperative
Banks - Transfer and Distribution of Credit Risk) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (rural cooperative banks - transfer and distribution of credit risk) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect on the day it is placed on the official website of the reserve bank of india
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall come into effect on the day it is placed on the official website
of the Reserve Bank of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect on the day it is placed on the official website of the reserve bank of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to rural cooperative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')
controls.control_description:
These directions shall be applicable to Rural Cooperative Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to rural cooperative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean state co-operative banks and central co-operative banks, as defined in the national bank for agriculture and rural development act, 1981
controls.control_description:
In this context, rural co-operative banks shall mean State Co-operative Banks and
Central Co-operative Banks, as defined in the National Bank for Agriculture and Rural
Development Act, 1981.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean state co-operative banks and central co-operative banks, as defined in the national bank for agriculture and rural development act, 1981

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or any statutory mod
controls.control_description:
All other expressions, unless defined in the respective parts, shall have the
same meaning as have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act,
1949 or the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 or any statutory modification or re-
enactment thereto or any other relevant regulation or as used in commercial parlance,
as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or any statutory mod

controls.control_objective: To ensure acquire loans only from a transferor specified as a lender in paragraph 11(4) unless specifically permitted
controls.control_description:
Banks shall acquire loans only from a transferor specified as a lender in
paragraph 11(4) unless specifically permitted.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to acquire loans only from a transferor specified as a lender in paragraph 11(4) unless specifically permitted

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake any loan transfers or acquisitions other than those permitted under this direction and in the manner prescribed therein
controls.control_description:
No bank shall undertake any loan transfers or acquisitions other than those
permitted under this direction and in the manner prescribed therein.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake any loan transfers or acquisitions other than those permitted under this direction and in the manner prescribed therein

controls.control_objective: To ensure be without prejudice to the provisions of master direction - external commercial borrowings, trade credits and structured obligations dated march 26
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be without prejudice to the provisions of master direction - external commercial borrowings, trade credits and structured obligations dated march 26

controls.control_objective: To ensure be mandatorily transferred to the transferee(s) to the extent of economic interest transferred
controls.control_description:
Provided that in cases of loan transfers, legal ownership of the loan shall be
mandatorily transferred to the transferee(s) to the extent of economic interest
transferred.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be mandatorily transferred to the transferee(s) to the extent of economic interest transferred

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply only to banks as transferor(s) in loan transfers
controls.control_description:
These directions shall apply only to banks as transferor(s) in loan transfers,
unless specifically made applicable to other categories of entities as transferee(s) as
per the specific permissions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply only to banks as transferor(s) in loan transfers

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply: (1) "credit enhancement" means a contractual arrangement in which an entity provides some degree of added protection to other parties to a tran
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of these Directions, following definitions shall apply:
(1) "credit enhancement" means a contractual arrangement in which an entity
provides some degree of added protection to other parties to a transaction so as to
mitigate the credit risk of their acquired exposures;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply: (1) "credit enhancement" means a contractual arrangement in which an entity provides some degree of added protection to other parties to a tran

controls.control_objective: To ensure be
controls.control_description:
(2) "default' means non-payment of debt (as defined under the Insolvency and
Bankruptcy Code, 2016) when whole or any part or instalment of the debt has become
due and payable and is not paid by the debtor or the corporate debtor, as the case
may be;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be

controls.control_objective: To ensure regional rural banks
controls.control_description: Provided that Regional Rural Banks;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to regional rural banks

controls.control_objective: To ensure the funded outstanding in a loan exposure reduced by the specific provisions made against such exposure
controls.control_description:
(5) "net book value (NBV)" means the funded outstanding in a loan exposure
reduced by the specific provisions made against such exposure;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the funded outstanding in a loan exposure reduced by the specific provisions made against such exposure

controls.control_objective: To ensure be categorised as personal loan if it falls within the purview of the above definition, even if such loans are not explicitly classified so in any reg
controls.control_description:
Explanation: A loan shall be categorised as personal loan if it falls within the purview
of the above definition, even if such loans are not explicitly classified so in any
regulatory / supervisory reporting.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be categorised as personal loan if it falls within the purview of the above definition, even if such loans are not explicitly classified so in any reg

controls.control_objective: To ensure a set of loan exposures transferred together at a point of time under the same transfer agreement
controls.control_description:
(8) "portfolio" means a set of loan exposures transferred together at a point of time
under the same transfer agreement;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a set of loan exposures transferred together at a point of time under the same transfer agreement

controls.control_objective: To ensure list the details of the individual loan exposures which are transferred as a portfolio
controls.control_description:
Provided that transfer agreements under which loans are transferred as a portfolio
shall list the details of the individual loan exposures which are transferred as a portfolio.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to list the details of the individual loan exposures which are transferred as a portfolio

controls.control_objective: To ensure "acquire" the loan exposures following a loan transfer
controls.control_description:
Explanation: Consequently, the transferee(s) shall "acquire" the loan exposures
following a loan transfer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to "acquire" the loan exposures following a loan transfer

controls.control_objective: To ensure the entity to which the economic interest in a loan exposure is transferred under these directions
controls.control_description:
(12) "transferee" means the entity to which the economic interest in a loan exposure
is transferred under these directions;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the entity to which the economic interest in a loan exposure is transferred under these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a person disqualified in terms of section 29a of the insolvency and bankruptcy code, 2016
controls.control_description:
Provided that a transferee shall not be a person disqualified in terms of Section 29A
of the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a person disqualified in terms of section 29a of the insolvency and bankruptcy code, 2016

controls.control_objective: To ensure neither belong to the existing promoter group of such borrower nor shall be a subsidiary / associate / related party etc
controls.control_description:
Provided further that in case of transfer of loan exposures of borrowers in whose
accounts instances of fraud have been detected by any lender, the transferee(s) shall
neither belong to the existing promoter group of such borrower nor shall be a
subsidiary / associate / related party etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to neither belong to the existing promoter group of such borrower nor shall be a subsidiary / associate / related party etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be alternatively referred to as the assignee under assignment transactions
controls.control_description:
Explanation I: In market parlance, transferee may be alternatively referred to as the
assignee under assignment transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be alternatively referred to as the assignee under assignment transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as in the securities and exchange board of india (issue of capital and disclosure requirements) regulations, 2018
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as in the securities and exchange board of india (issue of capital and disclosure requirements) regulations, 2018

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as in the insolvency and bankruptcy code, 2016
controls.control_description:
and the term 'related
party' shall have the same meaning as in the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as in the insolvency and bankruptcy code, 2016

controls.control_objective: To ensure be with the transferor(s)
controls.control_description:
Explanation III: The responsibility for verifying and establishing that the transferee(s)
comply with the above provisos shall be with the transferor(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be with the transferor(s)

controls.control_objective: To ensure the entity which transfers the economic interest in a loan exposure under these directions
controls.control_description:
(13) "transferor" means the entity which transfers the economic interest in a loan
exposure under these directions;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the entity which transfers the economic interest in a loan exposure under these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be alternatively referred to as the assignor under assignment transactions
controls.control_description:
Explanation: In market parlance, transferor may be alternatively referred to as the
assignor under assignment transactions, wherever applicable
12.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be alternatively referred to as the assignor under assignment transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or any statutory mod
controls.control_description:
All other expressions, unless defined in this Direction, shall have the same
meaning as have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or
the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 or any statutory modification or re-enactment
thereto or any other relevant regulation or as used in commercial parlance, as the case
may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or any statutory mod

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a comprehensive board approved policy for transfer and acquisition of loan exposures under these guidelines
controls.control_description:
The bank shall put in place a comprehensive Board approved policy for transfer
and acquisition of loan exposures under these guidelines.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a comprehensive board approved policy for transfer and acquisition of loan exposures under these guidelines

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia, lay down the minimum quantitative and qualitative standards relating to due diligence, valuation, requisite it systems for capture, stor
controls.control_description:
These guidelines must, inter
alia, lay down the minimum quantitative and qualitative standards relating to due
diligence, valuation, requisite IT systems for capture, storage and management of
data, risk management, periodic Board level oversight, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , inter alia, lay down the minimum quantitative and qualitative standards relating to due diligence, valuation, requisite it systems for capture, stor

controls.control_objective: To ensure also ensure independence of functioning and reporting responsibilities of the units and personnel involved in transfer / acquisition of loans from tha
controls.control_description:
Further, the policy must
also ensure independence of functioning and reporting responsibilities of the units and
personnel involved in transfer / acquisition of loans from that of personnel involved in
originating the loans.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also ensure independence of functioning and reporting responsibilities of the units and personnel involved in transfer / acquisition of loans from tha

controls.control_objective: To ensure meet the requirements as detailed in the policy
controls.control_description:
All transactions must meet the requirements as detailed in the
policy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to meet the requirements as detailed in the policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure result in transfer of economic interest without being accompanied by any change in underlying terms and conditions of the loan contract
controls.control_description:
Loan transfers should result in transfer of economic interest without being
accompanied by any change in underlying terms and conditions of the loan contract.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to result in transfer of economic interest without being accompanied by any change in underlying terms and conditions of the loan contract

controls.control_objective: To ensure be evaluated against restructuring as applicable
controls.control_description:
in take-out financing), the same shall be evaluated
against restructuring as applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be evaluated against restructuring as applicable

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer credit enhancements or liquidity facilities in any form in the case of loan transfers
controls.control_description:
Lenders referred to in Paragraph 11(4), regardless of whether they are
transferors or otherwise, should not offer credit enhancements or liquidity facilities in
any form in the case of loan transfers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer credit enhancements or liquidity facilities in any form in the case of loan transfers

controls.control_objective: To ensure result in immediate separation of the transferor from the risks and rewards associated with loans to the extent that the economic interest has been tr
controls.control_description:
A loan transfer should result in immediate separation of the transferor from the
risks and rewards associated with loans to the extent that the economic interest has
been transferred.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to result in immediate separation of the transferor from the risks and rewards associated with loans to the extent that the economic interest has been tr

controls.control_objective: To ensure clearly specify the distribution of the principal and interest income from the transferred loan between the transferor and the transferee(s)
controls.control_description:
In case of any retained economic interest in the exposure by the transferor, the loan
transfer agreement should clearly specify the distribution of the principal and interest
income from the transferred loan between the transferor and the transferee(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to clearly specify the distribution of the principal and interest income from the transferred loan between the transferor and the transferee(s)

controls.control_objective: To ensure result in credit enhancement
controls.control_description:
However, it is reiterated that any retention of economic interest by the transferor must
not result in credit enhancement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to result in credit enhancement

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the unfettered right to transfer or otherwise dispose of the loans free of any restraining condition to the extent of economic interest transferr
controls.control_description:
The transferee(s) should have the unfettered right to transfer or otherwise
dispose of the loans free of any restraining condition to the extent of economic interest
transferred to them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the unfettered right to transfer or otherwise dispose of the loans free of any restraining condition to the extent of economic interest transferr

controls.control_objective: To ensure have no recourse to the transferor for any expenses or losses linked to the transferred economic interest except those specifically permitted under th
controls.control_description:
<image>
(1) The transferee(s) shall have no recourse to the transferor for any expenses or
losses linked to the transferred economic interest except those specifically permitted
under these guidelines.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have no recourse to the transferor for any expenses or losses linked to the transferred economic interest except those specifically permitted under th

controls.control_objective: To ensure be constrained to obtain consent from the transferee(s) / transferor, as the case may be
controls.control_description:
(2) Further, the transferor / transferee(s) shall not be constrained to obtain consent
from the transferee(s) / transferor, as the case may be, when it comes to resolution or
recovery in respect of the beneficial economic interest retained by or transferred to the
respective entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be constrained to obtain consent from the transferee(s) / transferor, as the case may be

controls.control_objective: To ensure have no obligation to re-acquire or fund the re-payment of the loans or any part of it or substitute loans held by the transferee(s) or provide additi
controls.control_description:
The transferor shall have no obligation to re-acquire or fund the re-payment of
the loans or any part of it or substitute loans held by the transferee(s) or provide
additional loans to the transferee(s) at any time except those arising out of breach of
warranties or representations made at the time of transfer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have no obligation to re-acquire or fund the re-payment of the loans or any part of it or substitute loans held by the transferee(s) or provide additi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be able to demonstrate that a notice to this effect has been given to the transferee(s) and that the transferee(s) have acknowledged the absence of su
controls.control_description:
The transferor should be able to demonstrate that a notice to this effect has been given
to the transferee(s) and that the transferee(s) have acknowledged the absence of such
obligation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be able to demonstrate that a notice to this effect has been given to the transferee(s) and that the transferee(s) have acknowledged the absence of su

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that a mutually agreed and binding mechanism for timely invocation of such security interest
controls.control_description:
Wherever security interest is held by the transferor in trust with the transferee(s)
as the beneficiaries, the transferee(s) shall ensure that a mutually agreed and binding
mechanism for timely invocation of such security interest, if the need arises, has been
properly documented and put in place.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that a mutually agreed and binding mechanism for timely invocation of such security interest

controls.control_objective: To ensure contravene the rights of underlying obligors and all necessary consents from obligors (including from third parties)
controls.control_description:
The transfer of loans by transferor(s) must not contravene the rights of
underlying obligors and all necessary consents from obligors (including from third
parties), where necessary as per the respective contracts, should have been obtained.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contravene the rights of underlying obligors and all necessary consents from obligors (including from third parties)

controls.control_objective: To ensure notify rbi (department of supervision) of all instances where it has replaced loans transferred to a transferee or paid damages arising out of any rep
controls.control_description:
A transferor should notify RBI (Department of Supervision) of all instances
where it has replaced loans transferred to a transferee or paid damages arising out of
any representation or warranty.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to notify rbi (department of supervision) of all instances where it has replaced loans transferred to a transferee or paid damages arising out of any rep

controls.control_objective: To ensure be complied with in all cases
controls.control_description:
The extant instructions on outsourcing and the applicable provisions of Reserve
Bank of India (Rural Cooperative Banks - Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025 shall
be complied with in all cases.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be complied with in all cases

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain capital charge equal to the actual exposure acquired
controls.control_description:
In respect of exposures that do not meet the requirements of these directions,
transferee(s) shall maintain capital charge equal to the actual exposure acquired.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain capital charge equal to the actual exposure acquired

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to recognise the transferred loan in its <image> entirety, as if it was not transferred at all in the first place, and the consideration rece
controls.control_description:
In
such cases, the transferor shall continue to recognise the transferred loan in its
<image>
entirety, as if it was not transferred at all in the first place, and the consideration
received shall be recognised as an advance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to recognise the transferred loan in its <image> entirety, as if it was not transferred at all in the first place, and the consideration rece

controls.control_objective: To ensure engage a servicing facility provider, which may also be the transferor, to administer or service the acquired exposures
controls.control_description:
The transferee(s) may engage a servicing facility provider, which may also be
the transferor, to administer or service the acquired exposures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to engage a servicing facility provider, which may also be the transferor, to administer or service the acquired exposures

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the following conditions are fulfilled: (1) the nature, purpose, extent of the facility and all required standards of performance shall be
controls.control_description:
If a bank, including a transferor, performs the role of a servicing facility provider
for the transferee(s) after the loan transfer has occurred, it shall ensure that the
following conditions are fulfilled:
(1) The nature, purpose, extent of the facility and all required standards of
performance shall be clearly specified in a written agreement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the following conditions are fulfilled: (1) the nature, purpose, extent of the facility and all required standards of performance shall be

controls.control_objective: To ensure be any recourse to the lender beyond the fixed contractual obligations
controls.control_description:
(5) There should not be any recourse to the lender beyond the fixed contractual
obligations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be any recourse to the lender beyond the fixed contractual obligations

controls.control_objective: To ensure be under no obligation to remit funds to the transferee(s) until it has received funds generated from the underlying loans
controls.control_description:
<image>
(7) The bank should be under no obligation to remit funds to the transferee(s) until
it has received funds generated from the underlying loans.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be under no obligation to remit funds to the transferee(s) until it has received funds generated from the underlying loans

controls.control_objective: To ensure hold in trust, on behalf of the transferee(s), the cash flows arising from the underlying loans and shall avoid co-mingling of these cash flows with i
controls.control_description:
(8) The bank shall hold in trust, on behalf of the transferee(s), the cash flows arising
from the underlying loans and shall avoid co-mingling of these cash flows with its own
cash flows.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to hold in trust, on behalf of the transferee(s), the cash flows arising from the underlying loans and shall avoid co-mingling of these cash flows with i

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain capital on the loans transferred as if the loans in respect of which servicing facility is being provided are held by it directly on its book
controls.control_description:
Provided that if the above conditions are not satisfied, the transferor bank shall
maintain capital on the loans transferred as if the loans in respect of which servicing
facility is being provided are held by it directly on its books.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain capital on the loans transferred as if the loans in respect of which servicing facility is being provided are held by it directly on its book

controls.control_objective: To ensure be done through assignment or novation only
controls.control_description:
The transfer of stressed loans must be done through assignment or novation
only;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be done through assignment or novation only

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia, cover the following aspects: (1) norms and procedure for transfer of such loans
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , inter alia, cover the following aspects: (1) norms and procedure for transfer of such loans

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on the following principles: (1) the process of identification of stressed loans beyond a specified value, as may be determined by a bank's p
controls.control_description:
The policy on transfer of stressed loans shall be based on the following
principles:
(1) The process of identification of stressed loans beyond a specified value, as may
be determined by a bank's policy, for transfer shall follow a top-down approach i.e.,
the head office/corporate office of the bank shall be actively involved in identification
of stressed loans for transfer;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be based on the following principles: (1) the process of identification of stressed loans beyond a specified value, as may be determined by a bank's p

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed by the board/board committee at periodic intervals and a view, with documented rationale, be taken on transfer or otherwise
controls.control_description:
(2) At a minimum, all loans classified as NPA above a threshold amount decided
by the Board/Board Committee shall be reviewed by the Board/Board Committee at
periodic intervals and a view, with documented rationale, be taken on transfer or
otherwise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reviewed by the board/board committee at periodic intervals and a view, with documented rationale, be taken on transfer or otherwise

controls.control_objective: To ensure be listed for the purpose of transfer as indicated above
controls.control_description:
The loans identified for transfer shall be listed for the purpose of transfer as
indicated above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be listed for the purpose of transfer as indicated above

controls.control_objective: To ensure have clear policies with regard to valuation of loan exposures proposed to be transferred
controls.control_description:
Transferors should have clear policies with regard to valuation of loan
exposures proposed to be transferred.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have clear policies with regard to valuation of loan exposures proposed to be transferred

controls.control_objective: To ensure be clearly specified in the policy
controls.control_description:
The basis or the grounds which will determine
the type of valuation used - internal or external - must be clearly specified in the policy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be clearly specified in the policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be spelt out in the policy
controls.control_description:
The discount rate used by the transferor in the internal valuation exercise shall also be
spelt out in the policy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to also be spelt out in the policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure be either cost of equity or average cost of funds or <image> opportunity cost or some other relevant rate
controls.control_description:
This may be either cost of equity or average cost of funds or
<image>
opportunity cost or some other relevant rate, subject to a floor of the contracted interest
rate charged.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be either cost of equity or average cost of funds or <image> opportunity cost or some other relevant rate

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain two external valuation reports
controls.control_description:
However, in case the credit exposure being transferred (without netting
for provisions), singly, jointly, or severally, is ₹100 crore or more, the transferor shall
obtain two external valuation reports.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain two external valuation reports

controls.control_objective: To ensure be borne by the transferor
controls.control_description:
The cost of valuation exercise, external or
otherwise, shall be borne by the transferor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be borne by the transferor

controls.control_objective: To ensure transfer stressed loans, including through bilateral sales, only to permitted transferees and arcs
controls.control_description:
In general, bank shall transfer stressed loans, including through bilateral sales,
only to permitted transferees and ARCs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to transfer stressed loans, including through bilateral sales, only to permitted transferees and arcs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in terms of the board approved policy of the transferor
controls.control_description:
The manner of transfer must be in terms of the Board approved policy of the
transferor.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be in terms of the board approved policy of the transferor

controls.control_objective: To ensure also use e-auction platforms
controls.control_description:
Banks may also use e-auction platforms, wherever available, for
transferring their loans.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also use e-auction platforms

controls.control_objective: To ensure necessarily be followed by an auction through swiss challenge method if the aggregate exposure (including investment exposure) of lenders to the borro
controls.control_description:
However, when negotiated on a bilateral basis, such negotiations must
necessarily be followed by an auction through Swiss Challenge method if the
aggregate exposure (including investment exposure) of lenders to the borrower/s
whose loan is being transferred is ₹100 crore or more.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to necessarily be followed by an auction through swiss challenge method if the aggregate exposure (including investment exposure) of lenders to the borro

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the price discovery and value maximisation approaches adopted by the transferor as part of the board approved policy described in paragr
controls.control_description:
In all other cases, the bilateral
negotiations shall be subject to the price discovery and value maximisation
approaches adopted by the transferor as part of the Board approved policy described
in Paragraph 29, which may also include Swiss Challenge method.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be subject to the price discovery and value maximisation approaches adopted by the transferor as part of the board approved policy described in paragr

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that subsequent to transfer of the stressed loans, they do not assume any operational, legal or any other type of risks relating to the transfe
controls.control_description:
The transferor shall ensure that subsequent to transfer of the stressed loans,
they do not assume any operational, legal or any other type of risks relating to the
transferred loans including additional funding or commitments to the borrower /
transferee(s) with reference to the loan transferred.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that subsequent to transfer of the stressed loans, they do not assume any operational, legal or any other type of risks relating to the transfe

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than 12 months from the date of such transfer
controls.control_description:
Subsequently, fresh exposure may
be taken on the borrower after a cooling period laid down in the respective Board
approved policy of the transferor, which in any case, shall not be less than 12 months
from the date of such transfer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than 12 months from the date of such transfer

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide adequate time for due diligence by prospective acquirers, which may vary as per the size of the loan
controls.control_description:
The transferor(s) must provide adequate time for due diligence by prospective
acquirers, which may vary as per the size of the loan.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide adequate time for due diligence by prospective acquirers, which may vary as per the size of the loan

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that no transfer of a stressed loan is made at a contingent price whereby in the event of shortfall in the realization of the agreed price, the
controls.control_description:
The transferor(s) shall ensure that no transfer of a stressed loan is made at a
contingent price whereby in the event of shortfall in the realization of the agreed price,
the transferor(s) would have to bear a part of the shortfall.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that no transfer of a stressed loan is made at a contingent price whereby in the event of shortfall in the realization of the agreed price, the

controls.control_objective: To ensure transfer the stressed loans to transferee(s) other than arcs only on cash basis
controls.control_description:
The transferor shall transfer the stressed loans to transferee(s) other than ARCs
only on cash basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to transfer the stressed loans to transferee(s) other than arcs only on cash basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be received not later than at the time of transfer of loans, and the loan can be taken out of the books of the transferor only on receipt of the entir
controls.control_description:
The entire transfer consideration should be received not later than
at the time of transfer of loans, and the loan can be taken out of the books of the
transferor only on receipt of the entire transfer consideration.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be received not later than at the time of transfer of loans, and the loan can be taken out of the books of the transferor only on receipt of the entir

controls.control_objective: To ensure be debited to the profit and loss account of the year in which transfer has taken place
controls.control_description:
If the transfer to
transferee(s) other than ARCs is at a price below the net NBV at the time of transfer,
the shortfall shall be debited to the profit and loss account of the year in which transfer
has taken place.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be debited to the profit and loss account of the year in which transfer has taken place

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reversed
controls.control_description:
If the sale consideration is for a value higher than the NBV at the time
of transfer, the excess provisions may be reversed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reversed

controls.control_objective: To ensure be continued to be guided by the extant instructions as applicable to them in this regard
controls.control_description:
In the case of ARC, the asset classification of stressed loans acquired by it and
the associated provisions to be maintained shall be continued to be guided by the
extant instructions as applicable to them in this regard.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be continued to be guided by the extant instructions as applicable to them in this regard

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to pursue the staff accountability aspects as per the existing instructions in respect of the npas transferred to other lenders
controls.control_description:
The transferor shall continue to pursue the staff accountability aspects as per
the existing instructions in respect of the NPAs transferred to other lenders.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to pursue the staff accountability aspects as per the existing instructions in respect of the npas transferred to other lenders

controls.control_objective: To ensure include loan exposures classified as fraud as on the date of transfer provided that the responsibilities of the transferor with respect to continuous
controls.control_description:
This shall include loan exposures
classified as fraud as on the date of transfer provided that the responsibilities of the
transferor with respect to continuous reporting, monitoring, filing of complaints with law
enforcement agencies and proceedings related to such complaints shall also be
transferred to the ARC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include loan exposures classified as fraud as on the date of transfer provided that the responsibilities of the transferor with respect to continuous

controls.control_objective: To ensure be free to enter into agreement with the arc to share, in an agreed proportion, any surplus realised by the arc from the concerned stressed loan
controls.control_description:
In case of specific stressed loans, where it is considered necessary,
transferor(s) shall be free to enter into agreement with the ARC to share, in an agreed
proportion, any surplus realised by the ARC from the concerned stressed loan.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be free to enter into agreement with the arc to share, in an agreed proportion, any surplus realised by the arc from the concerned stressed loan

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide for a report from the arc to the transferor(s) on the value realised from the loan
controls.control_description:
In such
cases, the terms of transfer should provide for a report from the ARC to the
transferor(s) on the value realised from the loan.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to provide for a report from the arc to the transferor(s) on the value realised from the loan

controls.control_objective: To ensure account for the profit until it has materialised
controls.control_description:
Transferor(s) shall not account for
the profit until it has materialised.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to account for the profit until it has materialised

controls.control_objective: To ensure debit the shortfall to the profit and loss account for the year <image> in which the transfer has taken place
controls.control_description:
When the stressed loan is transferred to ARC at a price below the NBV at the
time of transfer, bank shall debit the shortfall to the profit and loss account for the year
<image>
in which the transfer has taken place.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to debit the shortfall to the profit and loss account for the year <image> in which the transfer has taken place

controls.control_objective: To ensure reverse the excess provision on transfer to the profit and loss account in the year the amounts are received and only when the sum of cash received by
controls.control_description:
On the other hand, when the stressed loan is transferred to an ARC for a value
higher than the NBV at the time of transfer, bank shall reverse the excess provision on
transfer to the profit and loss account in the year the amounts are received and only
when the sum of cash received by way of initial consideration and / or redemption or
transfer of Security Receipts (SR) / Pass Through Certificates (PTCs)/ other securities
issued by ARCs is higher than the NBV of the loan at the time of transfer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reverse the excess provision on transfer to the profit and loss account in the year the amounts are received and only when the sum of cash received by

controls.control_objective: To ensure be limited to the extent to which cash received exceeds the nbv of the loan at the time of transfer
controls.control_description:
Further,
such reversal shall be limited to the extent to which cash received exceeds the NBV
of the loan at the time of transfer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be limited to the extent to which cash received exceeds the nbv of the loan at the time of transfer

controls.control_objective: To ensure , the non-cash component of the excess provision [viz
controls.control_description: Provided that, the non-cash component of the excess provision [viz.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , the non-cash component of the excess provision [viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deducted from tier 1 capital, and no dividends shall be paid out of this component
controls.control_description:
excess provision
(-) cash received at the time of transfer] shall be deducted from Tier 1 capital, and no
dividends shall be paid out of this component.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deducted from tier 1 capital, and no dividends shall be paid out of this component

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued periodically by reckoning the net asset value (nav) declared by the arc based on the recovery ratings received for such instruments
controls.control_description:
Investments by lenders in SRs / PTCs / other securities issued by ARCs shall
be valued periodically by reckoning the Net Asset Value (NAV) declared by the ARC
based on the recovery ratings received for such instruments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued periodically by reckoning the net asset value (nav) declared by the arc based on the recovery ratings received for such instruments

controls.control_objective: To ensure carry the investment in their books on an ongoing basis, until its transfer or realization, at lower of the redemption value of srs arrived based on t
controls.control_description:
Provided that when transferors invest in the SRs/PTCs issued by ARCs in respect of
the stressed loans transferred by them to the ARC, the transferors shall carry the
investment in their books on an ongoing basis, until its transfer or realization, at lower
of the redemption value of SRs arrived based on the NAV as above, and the NBV of
the transferred stressed loan at the time of transfer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to carry the investment in their books on an ongoing basis, until its transfer or realization, at lower of the redemption value of srs arrived based on t

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the lower of the following: (1) value arrived at in terms of paragraph 45
controls.control_description:
If the investment by the transferor in SRs issued against loans transferred by it
is more than 10 percent of all SRs issued against the transferred asset, then the
valuation of the SRs on the books of the transferor shall be the lower of the following:
(1) value arrived at in terms of paragraph 45;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the lower of the following: (1) value arrived at in terms of paragraph 45

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable: (1) the difference between the carrying value of such srs and the valuation arrived at in terms of this clause, as on the next financia
controls.control_description:
Provided that in respect of valuation of investment in SRs outstanding in the books of
Rural Cooperative Banks, as on September 24, 2021, the following treatment shall be
applicable:
(1) The difference between the carrying value of such SRs and the valuation arrived
at in terms of this clause, as on the next financial reporting date after the date
of issuance of these directions, may be provided over a five-year period starting
with the financial year ending March 31, 2022 - i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable: (1) the difference between the carrying value of such srs and the valuation arrived at in terms of this clause, as on the next financia

controls.control_objective: To ensure , however, be strictly in terms of the provisions of these directions
controls.control_description:
(2) Subsequent valuation of investments in such SRs on an ongoing basis shall,
however, be strictly in terms of the provisions of these directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , however, be strictly in terms of the provisions of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a board approved plan to ensure that the provisioning made in each of the financial years in compliance of sub-clause (a) above is not le
controls.control_description:
(3) RCBs concerned shall put in place a board approved plan to ensure that the
provisioning made in each of the financial years in compliance of sub-clause (a)
above is not less than one fifth of the required provisioning on this count.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a board approved plan to ensure that the provisioning made in each of the financial years in compliance of sub-clause (a) above is not le

controls.control_objective: To ensure be strictly in terms of the provisions of these directions
controls.control_description:
(4) Valuation of investments in SRs made by all lenders after the issuance of these
directions shall be strictly in terms of the provisions of these directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be strictly in terms of the provisions of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued periodically by reckoning the net asset value (nav) declared by the arc based on the recovery ratings received for such instruments
controls.control_description:
(1) Notwithstanding the provisions contained in paragraph 46, or the proviso to
paragraph 45, SRs guaranteed by the Government of India shall be valued periodically
by reckoning the Net Asset Value (NAV) declared by the ARC based on the recovery
ratings received for such instruments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued periodically by reckoning the net asset value (nav) declared by the arc based on the recovery ratings received for such instruments

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deducted from tier 1 capital, and no dividends shall be paid out of such unrealized gains
controls.control_description:
(2) However, any unrealized gain recognized in the Profit and Loss Account on
account of fair valuation of such investments shall be deducted from Tier 1 capital, and
no dividends shall be paid out of such unrealized gains.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deducted from tier 1 capital, and no dividends shall be paid out of such unrealized gains

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued at ₹1
controls.control_description:
(3) Any SRs outstanding after the final settlement of the government guarantee or
the expiry of the guarantee period, whichever is earlier, shall be valued at ₹1.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued at ₹1

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed by the provisions as laid down under reserve bank of india (commercial banks - resolution of stressed assets) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
(4) In the event of the SRs being converted to any other form of instruments as part
of resolution, then the valuation and provisioning thereof, for such instruments shall be
governed by the provisions as laid down under Reserve Bank of India (Commercial
Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be governed by the provisions as laid down under reserve bank of india (commercial banks - resolution of stressed assets) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as loss asset in books of the lender and fully provided for
controls.control_description:
SRs/PTCs which are not redeemed as at the end of the resolution period (i.e.,
five years or eight years as the case may be) shall be treated as loss asset in books
of the lender and fully provided for.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as loss asset in books of the lender and fully provided for

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to lender's investment in debentures/ bonds/ srs /ptcs issued by arc
controls.control_description:
The valuation, classification and other norms applicable to investment in non-
SLR instruments prescribed by RBI from time to time shall be applicable to lender's
investment in debentures/ bonds/ SRs /PTCs issued by ARC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to lender's investment in debentures/ bonds/ srs /ptcs issued by arc

controls.control_objective: To ensure reckon the nav obtained from arc from time to time, for valuation of such investments
controls.control_description:
However, if any of the
above instruments issued by ARC is limited to the actual realisation of the financial
assets assigned to the instruments in the concerned scheme, the bank shall reckon
the NAV obtained from ARC from time to time, for valuation of such investments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reckon the nav obtained from arc from time to time, for valuation of such investments

controls.control_objective: To ensure be credited to the loan accounts
controls.control_description:
Where stressed loans are taken over by ARCs as agents for recovery in
exchange for a fee, the loans will not be removed from the books of the transferors but
realisations as and when received shall be credited to the loan accounts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be credited to the loan accounts

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue making provisions for the loan in the normal course
controls.control_description:
The
transferors shall continue making provisions for the loan in the normal course.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue making provisions for the loan in the normal course

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a board approved policy on adoption of swiss challenge method for transfer of their stressed loans
controls.control_description:
Subject to the requirements under Paragraph 34, the bank shall put in place a
board approved policy on adoption of Swiss Challenge Method for transfer of their
stressed loans.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a board approved policy on adoption of swiss challenge method for transfer of their stressed loans

controls.control_objective: To ensure opt for swiss challenge method, which could be based on parameters such as a tolerance limit for extent of haircut required by the lender(s) in the ba
controls.control_description:
(1) The policy should specify the conditions under which bank(s) may opt for Swiss
Challenge method, which could be based on parameters such as a tolerance limit for
extent of haircut required by the lender(s) in the base-bid (as specified in Paragraph
53), for instance, or any objective parameter identified by the bank(s)' Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to opt for swiss challenge method, which could be based on parameters such as a tolerance limit for extent of haircut required by the lender(s) in the ba

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than five per cent and shall not be more than 15 per cent
controls.control_description:
(2) The policy should also specify the minimum mark-up over the base-bid required
for the challenger bid (as specified in Paragraph 53) to be considered by the bank(s),
which in any case, shall not be less than five per cent and shall not be more than 15
per cent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than five per cent and shall not be more than 15 per cent

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the difference between the challenger bid and the base-bid expressed as a percentage of the base-bid
controls.control_description:
For this purpose, mark-up shall be the difference between the challenger bid
and the base-bid expressed as a percentage of the base-bid.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the difference between the challenger bid and the base-bid expressed as a percentage of the base-bid

controls.control_objective: To ensure be maintained by the lenders
controls.control_description:
On an ongoing basis, the bank should identify the stressed loans which will be
offered for transfer and an authenticated list of such loans shall be maintained by the
lenders.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be maintained by the lenders

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at the discretion of the lender, be disclosed to prospective bidder on entering into confidentiality agreement
controls.control_description:
The list may, at the discretion of the lender, be disclosed to prospective bidder
on entering into confidentiality agreement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at the discretion of the lender, be disclosed to prospective bidder on entering into confidentiality agreement

controls.control_objective: To ensure be termed as the base-bid
controls.control_description:
The broad contours of the Swiss Challenge Method are as under:
(1) A prospective transferee interested in acquiring a specific stressed loan may
offer a bid to the bank(s), which shall be termed as the base-bid.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be termed as the base-bid

controls.control_objective: To ensure then publicly call for counter bids from other perspective buyers, on comparable terms, by disclosing the essential elements of the base-bid and also
controls.control_description:
(2) The bank(s) shall then publicly call for counter bids from other perspective
buyers, on comparable terms, by disclosing the essential elements of the base-bid and
also clearly specifying the minimum mark-up (as specified in Paragraph 51) that would
be acceptable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to then publicly call for counter bids from other perspective buyers, on comparable terms, by disclosing the essential elements of the base-bid and also

controls.control_objective: To ensure become the winning bid
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to become the winning bid

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the winning bid
controls.control_description:
else, the challenger
bid shall be the winning bid.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the winning bid

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - financial statements: presentation and disclosures) directions, 2025 for all disclosure
controls.control_description:
The banks should be guided by Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative
Banks - Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025 for all
disclosure related requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - financial statements: presentation and disclosures) directions, 2025 for all disclosure

controls.control_objective: To ensure report each loan transfer transaction undertaken under these directions to a trade reporting platform as notified by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
Banks shall report each loan transfer transaction undertaken under these
directions to a trade reporting platform as notified by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report each loan transfer transaction undertaken under these directions to a trade reporting platform as notified by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain a database of loan transfer transactions with adequate mis concerning each transaction till the reporting platform is notified and the relate
controls.control_description:
In anticipation of the same, bank
<image>
shall maintain a database of loan transfer transactions with adequate MIS concerning
each transaction till the reporting platform is notified and the related instructions are
issued.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain a database of loan transfer transactions with adequate mis concerning each transaction till the reporting platform is notified and the relate

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions,
instructions and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these directions shall
continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.control_description:
Further,
the repeal of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way
prejudicially affect:
(1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may
be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in
force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
<image>
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these
Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
